question: Which of the following collections is a well-defined set?
options: The collection of all difficult problems in mathematics
The collection of five most renowned mathematicians of the world
The collection of all natural numbers less than 100
The collection of most dangerous animals of the world
answer: The collection of all natural numbers less than 100
